summary: KOSPI closed down 4.47% at 5234.05 amid geopolitical tensions. Despite market bearishness, the art market saw a record-breaking auction result at Seoul Auction today with Yoshitomo Nara's work fetching KRW 15 billion. ART OnO 2026 fair continues, with the Galleries Art Fair opening next week.

data.art_market_outlook: record-breaking auction activity despite macro headwinds
